steps.title: Identify the information that addresses the goal
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize Tecozautla's SIZE. The most relevant note for accomplishing this is the concrete measurement: “Tecozautla covers an area of roughly 535 km².” This is the specific detail that makes size vivid.

steps.title: Find the choice that emphasizes size
steps.content: Choice A centers on the area measurement (“covers an area of roughly 535 km²”), making size the focal point. Choices B, C, and D all omit the actual area measurement, so none emphasizes size directly. That matches choice A — A is correct.
